2606.23992.title: RASC+: Retrieval-Constrained LLM Adjudication for Clinical Value Set Authoring
2606.23992.paper_summary: Clinical value sets define the standardized terminology codes used in quality measurement, phenotyping, cohort construction, and clinical decision support. The recently introduced Retrieval-Augmented Set Completion (RASC) benchmark showed that direct zero-shot large language model (LLM) generation is poorly suited to this task: clinical code systems are large, version-controlled, and not reliably memorized by language models. We study a stage-wise alternative in which candidate-pool construction is optimized for recall and a constrained LLM adjudicator is optimized for candidate selection. On the full 3,744-value-set RASC test split, Qwen3-based retrieval with vocabulary-aware expansion and code-display rescue retrieval increases candidate-pool recall from the original RASC retrieval baseline of 0.553 to 0.730; on the held-out-publisher stratum, pool recall is 0.655. The higher-recall pool alone is not sufficient: applying the original SAPBert cross-encoder to this expanded pool gives full-test macro F1 of 0.287 and held-out-publisher macro F1 of 0.233. Replacing the stage-2 selector with blinded GPT-5 adjudication over the same pool increases full-test macro F1 to 0.549 and held-out-publisher macro F1 to 0.533. These results show that retrieval-constrained LLM adjudication can substantially improve value set completion while preserving the safety constraint that all returned codes must come from an auditable candidate pool.
2606.23992.paper_summary_zh: 臨床價值集定義了在質量測量、表型分析、隊列構建和臨床決策支持中使用的標準化術語代碼。最近引入的檢索增強集完成（RASC）基準顯示，直接的零樣本大型語言模型（LLM）生成不太適合這項任務：臨床代碼系統龐大、版本控制且語言模型無法可靠記憶。我們研究了一種階段性替代方案，其中候選池的構建針對召回進行優化，而受限的LLM裁決者則針對候選選擇進行優化。在完整的3,744值集RASC測試拆分中，基於Qwen3的檢索結合詞彙感知擴展和代碼顯示救援檢索將候選池的召回率從原始RASC檢索基線的0.553提高到0.730；在保留的出版商層中，池的召回率為0.655。僅有更高召回率的池是不夠的：將原始的SAPBert交叉編碼器應用於這個擴展池，得到的全測試宏F1為0.287，而保留出版商的宏F1為0.233。將第二階段選擇器替換為對相同池進行盲測的GPT-5裁決，將全測試宏F1提高到0.549，保留出版商的宏F1提高到0.533。這些結果顯示，受檢索限制的LLM裁決可以顯著改善價值集的完成，同時保持所有返回的代碼必須來自可審計候選池的安全限制。
2606.23992.author: Sumit Mukherjee et.al.
